title: MeterDataRequestCredential
description: W3C Verifiable Credential wrapping a MeterDataRequest. Subclass of EnergyCredential. Issued by the data requester (e.g., DISCOM) to prove authorisation to request smart meter telemetry from a provider.

credentialSubject.description: The subject of the credential: the requesting entity and the specific MeterDataRequest they are authorised to make.

MeterDataRequestCredentialSubject.description: The subject of the credential: the requesting entity and the specific MeterDataRequest they are authorised to make.

id.description: DID of the requesting entity (e.g., the DISCOM).

meterDataRequest.description: The scoped, time-bounded data request. Specifies the meter resources, hierarchical scope, time window, and profile types being requested. The provider validates this against its capability profile before fulfilling delivery.
